title: GetResponse vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: GetResponse vs Flodesk: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between GetResponse and Flodesk comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. GetResponse is built for online course creators and webinar hosts, while Flodesk targets visual brands, photographers, and designers. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_a: Online Course Creators And Webinar Hosts

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on online course creators and webinar hosts
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on visual brands, photographers, and designers

faq.a: It depends on your use case. GetResponse wins for online course creators and webinar hosts, while Flodesk is stronger for visual brands, photographers, and designers. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, GetResponse or Flodesk?
faq.a: GetResponse starts at a lower price point ($19/mo vs $38/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to GetResponse?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Flodesk to GetResponse is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
